about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Redefining international education through real mentorship.
about.founder_p1: As graduates of Keio University PEARL and international schools across London and Dublin, we experienced the intense pressure of global education firsthand. We navigated the IB, conquered the IELTS, and tackled rigorous university admissions.
about.founder_p2: But throughout that journey, we noticed a systemic flaw: traditional cram schools prioritize rigid formulas and exorbitant admission fees over genuine student mentorship. They offer 'teachers', not 'mentors'.
about.founder_p3: We built Petra Tutors to be the service we wish we had. A network of elite, relatable mentors from top universities who understand exactly what it takes to succeed, providing flexible, 1:1 guidance tailored perfectly to each student's ambitions.
about.s1_desc: High admission fees often lock families in. Rigid curricula fail to address the specific needs of international and returnee students. The focus is on passing the next test, not building long-term academic resilience.
about.s2_desc: We charge absolutely zero admission fees. We pair students with mentors from institutions like Todai and HKU. Every lesson is fully customized for the individual, whether online or in-person.
about.s4_desc: Our students don't just improve their IELTS scores or GPA—they gain the confidence and independent thinking skills necessary to thrive at the world's best universities.

no_fee.title: Transparent Pricing
no_fee.subtitle: Premium education shouldn't start with a penalty. We believe in accessible excellence.
no_fee.explanation: Many tutoring institutions and cram schools charge exorbitant admission fees between ¥10,000–¥30,000 just to enrol. Petra Tutors charges absolutely no admission fee.
no_fee.b2: Flexible lesson plans that adapt to you
no_fee.b3: Pay only for the lessons you take

tutors.title: Meet Our Tutors
tutors.subtitle: A curated network of exceptional educators from top universities worldwide.
tutors.scarcity_disclaimer: This tutor is in high demand. If they are at capacity, we will match you with a mentor of equal standing.

pricing.title: Simple & Flexible Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Discover the ideal plan for your goals. Start with a free trial lesson to discuss your pathway.
pricing.micro_copy_1: *Rates vary by subject, level, and tutor
pricing.micro_copy_2: Most students invest between ¥4,000–¥8,000 per hour
pricing.continuity_body: Consistency is key to academic growth. We offer more efficient plan designs and pricing for students committed to regular, long-term learning.
pricing.g_desc: Interactive learning. Perfect for those who want peer practice at a better rate.
pricing.dec_title: Not sure which pathway is right?
pricing.dec_subtitle: Book a free trial. We'll design a custom pathway and match you with the perfect mentor.
pricing.dec_l_desc: Fastest route to your goal. Focused fully on your needs.
pricing.dec_r_desc: Interactive & affordable. Great for conversational peer practice.
pricing.note_desc: The rates listed are starting estimates. Final pricing is determined based on the complexity of the subject, student level, and the specific expertise of your mentor. We believe in transparent, value-driven education.
pricing.no_fee_link: About our No Admission Fee policy →

programs.title: Our Programmes
programs.subtitle: Expert-led, personalised tutoring designed to help you excel. Book your free 30-minute trial lesson today.
programs.custom_title: Don't see exactly what you need?

inquiry.q_purpose_title: Q1. What is your primary goal?

inquiry.success_desc: Thank you for reaching out to Petra Tutors. Our tutoring success team will review your inquiry and reply shortly with the next steps in our matching process.

business.pain_title: 英語がビジネスの壁になっていませんか？
business.pain_1: 英語での会議・発言に自信がない

business.outcome_title: 実務で使える英語を、短期間で習得
